subcodes.first_line: O thou who hearkenest unto what this Prisoner calleth out unto thee, purely for the sake of thy Lord, that thou mayest inhale the fragrances of love from this garment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما ینادیک هذا لمسجون خالصا لوجه ربک لتجد نفحات الحب من قمیص
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @twin Manifestations, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God
